title: Lucid stock pops on new CEO, fresh funding from Saudi PIF, Uber
text: Lucid revealed it will receive $750 million in new investment from PIF and Uber, supporting the company as it ramps up Gravity SUV production and develops its upcoming midsize EV. As part of the agreement with Uber, the company increased its purchase commitment to at least 35,000 Lucid vehicles designed exclusively for Uber's robotaxi service, with Uber committing an additional $200 million investment to raise its total investments to $550 million. The new CEO appointment and expanded Uber partnership signaled a strategic pivot for Lucid toward robotaxi applications and further diversified funding sources.
